div.p: At 6: 53 a. m. (EDT) on July 1 a teletype conference was held with HQ, FEC in Tokyo by military officials in Washington along with representatives of the Department of State and other agencies (DA TT–3445). G–2 in Tokyo reported that the North Koreans threatened Suwon and that the members of the disorganized ROK Government had moved to Taejon. (Korean Conflict)
